parameters.query:
SELECT dc.platform, dc.product_id, dc.product_url, dc.product_name, dc.image_url, dc.current_price, dc.original_price, dc.discount_pct, dc.coupon_code
FROM deal_candidates dc
LEFT JOIN posted_deals pd ON pd.platform = dc.platform AND pd.product_id = dc.product_id
WHERE dc.found_at > now() - interval '35 minutes'
  AND (pd.product_id IS NULL OR dc.current_price < pd.last_posted_price)
ORDER BY dc.discount_pct DESC
LIMIT 5;

INSERT INTO posted_deals (platform, product_id, last_posted_price, last_posted_at)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, now())
ON CONFLICT (platform, product_id)
DO UPDATE SET last_posted_price = EXCLUDED.last_posted_price, last_posted_at = EXCLUDED.last_posted_at;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Gerar Link e Mensagem').item.json.platform, $('Gerar Link e Mensagem').item.json.product_id, $('Gerar Link e Mensagem').item.json.current_price] }}
